summary: Completed frontend testing of Profit Tracker final improvements. All 10 features verified working. Fixed one bug: Reset balance display was rounding instead of truncating to 2 decimals.
passed_tests: Trading Signal Banner: Shows product (MOIL10), direction (BUY), time (19:29), timezone (Asia/Manila) ✓
Trade Now Button: Opens https://www.meringlobaltrading.com/ in new tab ✓
Current LOT Size Card: Shows 14.71 (2 decimal places) ✓
Total Deposits Card: Currency dropdown (USD, PHP, EUR, GBP) inside card ✓
Total Deposits: Shows converted amount in selected currency ✓
Buttons Alignment: Deposit Records, Withdrawal Records, Reset Tracker aligned to right ✓
Projection LOT Size: All LOT values show 2 decimals (20.55, 40.10, 109.29, 811.70) ✓
Monthly Table LOT Size: All LOT values show 2 decimals ✓
Reset Balance: Display now uses truncateTo2Decimals (fixed) ✓
critical_code_review_comments: All Profit Tracker final improvements implemented correctly
truncateTo2Decimals function (Math.trunc(num * 100) / 100) used for LOT sizes
Trading signal banner fetches from /trade/active-signal API
Currency dropdown moved inside Total Deposits card with 4 options
Action buttons restructured with right alignment for records/reset buttons
seed_data_creation: None - Used existing test data from previous iterations
context_for_next_testing_agent: Profit Tracker final improvements fully tested. Key features: 1) Trading Signal banner with Trade Now button linking to Merin, 2) Currency dropdown (USD/PHP/EUR/GBP) inside Total Deposits card, 3) All LOT sizes truncated to 2 decimals (not rounded), 4) Action buttons (Deposit Records, Withdrawal Records, Reset Tracker) aligned to right. Fixed bug: Reset balance display was using formatMoney which rounds - changed to use truncateTo2Decimals first.

bug_fixed.issue: Reset balance display was using formatMoney(parseFloat(newAccountValue)) which rounds values
bug_fixed.fix: Changed to formatMoney(truncateTo2Decimals(parseFloat(newAccountValue))) to truncate instead of round
